ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( ISPICKVAL( LegalNature__c ,"Individual Company"), ISPICKVAL( LegalNature__c, "Natural Entity (Private Person)") ), OR( ISBLANK(LastName__c), ISBLANK(FirstName__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill out First- & Last Name. (ACM012)
